scriptNotDaemon: Script "{filename}" is not a daemon (mode={mode}). Declare mode: daemon in the runtime block of SKILL.md to start it as a background process.
jsNotSupported: Daemons do not support the "javascript" language (isolated-vm). Use "python" or "node".
alreadyRunning: A daemon for "{filename}" is already running (id: {id})
stopBeforeDelete: Stop the daemon before deleting it
